system.description:
*magical*, *loud*

When you **_strike this tuning fork against a_** **_hard surface_**, it emits a loud tone for about a minute. Nearby (*reach*, *area*) magical effects and creatures become visible: shaking, vibrating, distorted. The noise draws the attention of any spirits or magically attuned beings for miles around.

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.3UhyCbr1XGkhX6SO]{Tempest Lords}.*
